s_house.name: south of house
s_house.description: a small almost abandoned looking house with a front door.
s_house.on-enter_text: You gain conciousness, and notice you have a note in your pocket. A small almost abandoned looking house with a front door is in front of you

w_house.name: west of house
w_house.description: On this side of the house, there is a small window
w_house.on-enter_text: Getting into this house is tricky, on this side of the house, there is a small window

n_house.name: north of house
n_house.description: On this side of the house, there's nothing but grass and a wall of the house
n_house.on-enter_text: On this side of the house, there's nothing but grass and a wall of the house

e_house.name: east of house
e_house.description: On this side of the house, there's a window.
e_house.on-enter_text: On this side of the house, there's a window.

name: kitchen
kitchen.description: An empty kitchen with nothing in it.
kitchen.on-enter_text: inside, there's an empty kitchen with a cup of purple juice on the counter. Although there's a trapdoor in the spit middle of it. Next to the kitchen is the living room

name: living room
other room
livingroom.description: An empty dirtya and trashed living room with a window facing the East wall of the house.
livingroom.on-enter_text: An empty dirtya and trashed living room with a window facing the East wall of the house. On the floor you notice a metal key

name: mine base
mine room
minebase
mineroom
minebase.description: A dimly lit up room with metal walls.
minebase.on-enter_text: When you get down from the ladder, there's a dimly lit up room with metal walls. On the floor of this room, there's a dirty old metal picaxe. There's also an opening to go through in front of you.

name: coalmine
coal mine
coalmine.description: An empty coal mine with all the coal dug out already.
coalmine.on-enter_text: A dark empty space follows. You feel something metal on the ground. Circular and long.
